## Verification

Follow `docs/contributing/quality-gates.md`.

Common checks:

- [ ] `pnpm run format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm run docs:lint`

Additional code-bearing checks:

- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`

PR readiness:

- [ ] Commit sign-off trailers satisfy `docs/contributing/commit-messages.md`
